titleStmt.title: SII 31.102: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 102. (A.R. No. B 295 of 1938.) VELUDURTI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Chennakēśavasvāmi temple.
This inscription is dated in Śaka 1471, Saumya, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Friday, regular corresponding to July 5, 1549 A.D.

Registers the gift of taxes Peṁṭasuṁkhamu and Magama collected from the villages around Veludurti, which are in turn given for the maintenance of dasami festivals to the temple of Chennarāya of Veludurti, by Kūnapuli Immaḍi Basivi-Nāyaḍu. It is stated that the village Veludoṟti is stated to have been situated in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma and given as nāyaṁkara by the king Sadāśivadēva Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujā
yanamaḥ . svasti . śrījayā
dbudaya śālivāhana
śakavarurṣalu 1471
Agunēṭi saumyasaṁvatsara
Āṣāḍha śū1 śu veludo
riti ceṁnnarāyaniki daśa
mi mahātsavālakuve
ludoṟu Iṁdullō pa
llelu sahā kaligina pēṁṭa
suṁkhaṁ magamānu śrī
maṁnmahārājādhi rā
ja rājaparamēśvara vīrapra
tāpa sadāsivadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagara
maṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsa
nārūḍhulai pṛdhivi sāṁ
rājyaṁ sēyu cuṁḍa gā
nu ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōni
pelidoṟu tamanāyaṁ
krunakuṁ cellagānu ku

napuliImmaḍi
basivināyaḍu
tamatalli taṁḍrā
dulakuṁ puṇyaṁ
gānu caṁnnarāya
niki daśamimahō
tsavālaku peṁṭa
suṁkhamu maga
mānu dhāravōsi
Iccenu . Idōsaṁ
Ācaṁdrārkaṁ cella
galadi Idharṁmā
naku yavara dappi
nānu mātruga
mana savōda
ra gamanālu sē
sina pāpānaṁ
pōvuvāru Ani
vrāśina śāsanaṁ .
maṁggaḷamahā
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
